match.userMessage:
Eye-level handheld tracks forward through shallow surf as Scarlett wades deeper, water swirling around her calves. A surfer paddles across frame left to right, board slicing through foam. Slight natural sway follows the wading rhythm. Incoming waves lap softly against legs. Fabric flutters lightly in sea breeze.

Ambient sounds: gentle ocean waves lapping, distant surf. water swirling around calves, surfer paddle slicing water.
